objective.title: Recover the Dawn Key
objective.playerText: Find the sealed reliquary beneath the old watch-fort and recover the Dawn Key before the dungeon fully wakes.

log: You step into the sunken stairwell. The dungeon exhales cold dust.

playerVisible.description: Broken steps descend into greenish gloom. Old spearheads jut from the walls like rusted teeth. A draft carries the smell of wet stone and extinguished candles.

hidden.dmNotes: Opening room. Establish objective tone. No hidden content to reveal yet.

search.text: You find a chalk mark: three short lines beneath a rising sun.

playerVisible.description: Two cracked shield statues face each other across a narrow hall. Their bronze faces have been scratched away. The floor is marked by dragged footprints heading east and west.

hidden.dmNotes: Central branching hub. C02 helps identify final seal sequence.

search.text: Behind one shield is an inscription: 'The first seal opens to the hand that refuses greed.'

loot.name: Brass Torchcap
loot.text: A brass cap that lets a torch burn in damp air.

playerVisible.description: Ankle-deep water covers a ruined guardroom. A drowned weapon rack leans against the far wall. Something pale moves beneath the surface, then stops.

hidden.dmNotes: Monster gate. Search can reveal safe footing.

search.text: You spot darker stones forming a safe path through the water.

loot.name: Old Guard Token
loot.text: A corroded token stamped with a sunburst.

monster.name: Pale Water Ghoul
monster.playerText: A pale ghoul rises from the water, more annoyance than tactical masterpiece.

playerVisible.description: Shelves of wax tablets sag beneath centuries of dust. Hundreds of black candles sit unlit in wall niches. One candle still smokes.

hidden.dmNotes: Lore and clue room. C04 points to reliquary.

search.text: A tablet says the Dawn Key was sealed where the blind sun looks down.

playerVisible.description: A dry marble font stands beneath a golden handprint. Coins glitter inside the basin, though none look freshly dropped.

hidden.dmNotes: Player should infer not to take coins. Loot action increases threat.

search.text: Scratched around the basin: 'Leave tribute untouched; take only what was lost.'

loot.name: Silver Reliquary Pin
loot.text: A small pin shaped like a closed eye.

playerVisible.description: A stone sun hangs above an altar, but its centre has been gouged into a hollow eye. Faded kneeling cushions form a path north.

hidden.dmNotes: C06 reveals final room direction. Optional loot.

search.text: The altar groove points toward a hidden lower chamber beyond the north door.

loot.name: Dawn-thread Cord
loot.text: A warm cord woven with gold fibre.

playerVisible.description: Three tiny cells crumble into each other. Ink-stained bones clutch slate boards. The ceiling sags like it is considering career options.

hidden.dmNotes: Threat room. Search gives clue, but also noise.

search.text: One slate repeats: 'When the watcher wakes, the final door remembers every footstep.'

playerVisible.description: A tall black mirror reflects the room without reflecting you. Three empty hooks hang beside it. The glass shows a closed door somewhere deeper below.

hidden.dmNotes: C08 is required. Mirror clue helps final seal.

search.text: The mirror writes in frost: 'Empty hands. Open eye. Dawn thread.'

playerVisible.description: A narrow stone bridge crosses a black shaft. Far below, something enormous turns in its sleep. A sealed bronze door waits to the north.

hidden.dmNotes: Final gate. Can enter finale regardless, but warning if clues missing.

search.text: You find three shallow slots in the bridge rail: hand, eye, thread.

monster.name: Bronze Door Warden
monster.playerText: A bronze warden unfolds from the doorway, blocking the way with ceremonial stubbornness.

playerVisible.description: A circular chamber glows with trapped sunrise. The Dawn Key floats inside a glass reliquary, bound by three bands: hand, eye, and thread.

hidden.dmNotes: Finale. Complete objective if C02, C05, C08 discovered or allow risky completion otherwise.

search.text: The bands loosen as your gathered clues align: refuse greed, open the blind eye, bind with dawn-thread.

loot.name: Dawn Key
loot.text: The recovered objective. It hums like sunrise in a bottle.

clueBook.C01: Three chalk lines beneath a rising sun.
clueBook.C04: The Dawn Key lies where the blind sun looks down.
clueBook.C05: Leave tribute untouched; take only what was lost.
clueBook.C06: The altar points to a lower chamber.
clueBook.C07: The final door remembers every footstep.
clueBook.C08: Empty hands. Open eye. Dawn thread.
clueBook.C09: Slots in the bridge: hand, eye, thread.
clueBook.C10: The final bands answer to the gathered clues.
